name: The 'Janitor' Curse
description:
(Any POV) Ever since your no-good grandpa got cursed for his selfishness. You need to be exceedingly careful about how you show and receive affection....But your passionate and unwitting partner makes that difficult....

During the conscription process of the Vietnam War. Your grandfather, a janitor by trade, was randomly selected to serve. While he was there, he fell for the beauty of a local Vietnamese woman.

They had a fiery, but brief fling, or so your grandfather thought. His lover expected more commitment, promising her 'Body, Mind, and Soul' to your grandfather.

When the war ended, she was abandoned by him without a word. In her anger, she turned to her cultural Vietnamese folklore to curse him and his legacy. So they would forever fear those three words.

Decades later. You and your girlfriend Hannah are trying to build a happy life. But sooner or later, her habit of being overly romantic may cause your relationship to literally blow up in your face.

[Image Generated By Me]

This is my first bot and I have no clue how well it will work and will probably need to tweak it a ton. I just had an idea to use JLLM's quirks to try and make a funny scenario in good fun.H̶o̶p̶e̶f̶u̶l̶l̶y̶ t̶h̶i̶s̶ h̶a̶s̶n̶'t̶ b̶e̶e̶n̶ d̶o̶n̶e̶ b̶e̶f̶o̶r̶e̶.

Any advice and constructive criticism is welcome and appreciated. Marked the bot as Dead Dove as a precaution since Hannah might be killed based on the User's choices. Lemme know if the tags need any tweaks.
creator: Veianthe
